title: AAD Evolution Meta
description: Cross-project comparison metadata for AI-assisted development corpus

project_name.description: Human-readable project name (may be genericized for anonymization)

primary_language.description: Primary programming language(s) of the project

ai_assisted.description: Degree of AI assistance used during development

total_commits.description: Total number of commits in the repository

date_range_days.description: Calendar days from first commit to last commit

fix_feat_ratio_first_half.description: Ratio of fix commits to feat commits in the first half of the project timeline

fix_feat_ratio_second_half.description: Ratio of fix commits to feat commits in the second half of the project timeline

median_gap_hours_first_half.description: Median inter-commit gap in hours during the first half of the project

median_gap_hours_second_half.description: Median inter-commit gap in hours during the second half of the project

dominant_rework_topic.description: The subsystem or concern that dominated rework commits (e.g. auth, UI/CSS, schema)

explicit_iteration_commits.description: Count of commits with explicit iteration markers (v2, attempt, retry, revert, rollback, etc.)

rollback_commits.description: Count of explicit rollback or revert commits

loc_first.description: Lines of code at first (genesis) snapshot

loc_last.description: Lines of code at final (HEAD) snapshot

test_ratio_first.description: Ratio of test LOC to source LOC at genesis snapshot (0.0 to 1.0)

test_ratio_last.description: Ratio of test LOC to source LOC at HEAD snapshot (0.0 to 1.0)

max_gap_hours.description: Longest single inter-commit gap in hours

max_gap_context.description: Human-readable description of what was happening during the longest gap

security_quality_first.description: Security quality rating at the genesis snapshot (key management, secrets hygiene, auth posture)

security_quality_last.description: Security quality rating at HEAD snapshot

code_quality_first.description: Code quality rating at the genesis snapshot (structure, test coverage, tech debt signals)

code_quality_last.description: Code quality rating at HEAD snapshot

planning_doc_present.description: Whether a SPRINT.md, PLAN.md, ROADMAP.md, or equivalent planning artifact exists at HEAD

planning_doc_loc_last.description: Lines of code in the planning document at HEAD (0 if absent)

contributor.description: GitHub handle of the person submitting to the corpus

submitted_date.description: ISO 8601 date when this entry was submitted to the corpus
